CustomField.description: Mask value controls when a mapping is applied to a Standard Object Record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Mapping applicability is controlled by certain flags. Currently supported: Skip new = 1 Skip updating = 2 Skip if Source != DHC = 4 Skip if Source != DHC && Field Not Empty = 8 Turn off multiple flags by setting the Mask to sum of indiv. values
CustomField.label: Mask
